maximum_flow:
```python
import random
from typing import Dict, List, Hashable, Tuple, Union, Any

Adj = Dict[Hashable, List[Union[Hashable, Tuple[Hashable, Any], List[Union[Hashable, Any]]]]]

def generate_max_flow_sample_from_adj(adj: Adj) -> Tuple[Any, Any]:
    # Collect all nodes
    nodes = set(adj.keys())
    for u, nbrs in adj.items():
        if not nbrs:
            continue
        for item in nbrs:
            if isinstance(item, (tuple, list)):   # weighted neighbor
                if item:                          # avoid empty []
                    v = item[0]
                    nodes.add(v)
            else:                                 # plain neighbor
                nodes.add(item)

    nodes = list(nodes)
    if len(nodes) == 0:
        return None, None
    if len(nodes) == 1:
        return nodes[0], nodes[0]

    # Choose two distinct random nodes
    return tuple(random.sample(nodes, 2))```
